requirement.title: Semi-Isolated Settings Builder
requirement.description: buildPluginDirSettings() creates settings that disable all installed plugins and auto-memory, but preserve CLAUDE.md/rules access.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Output JSON has enabledPlugins with all installed plugins set to false. REQ-F002
Output JSON has autoMemoryEnabled: false. REQ-F002
Output JSON does NOT include claudeMdExcludes (preserves CLAUDE.md/rules). REQ-F002
Returns valid JSON string even if claude CLI is unavailable. REQ-F002

requirement.title: Plugin Dir Support In runTrial
requirement.description: runTrial() accepts pluginDir option and passes it as --plugin-dir to claude CLI. When pluginDir is set, uses semi-isolated settings.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: When options.pluginDir is set, claude CLI args include --plugin-dir <path>. REQ-F003
When pluginDir is set, writePluginDirSettings() is called instead of writeIsolationSettings(). --strict-mcp-config is NOT added. REQ-F004
When pluginDir path does not exist, trial fails with infraError: true and descriptive error message. REQ-F003
When pluginDir is not set, existing isolation behavior is unchanged. REQ-N002

requirement.title: Max Turns Support In runTrial
requirement.description: runTrial() accepts maxTurns option and passes it as --max-turns to claude CLI.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: When options.maxTurns is set, claude CLI args include --max-turns <N>. REQ-F003
When maxTurns is not set and pluginDir is set, default is 10. REQ-F003
When neither maxTurns nor pluginDir is set, no --max-turns flag is passed (existing behavior: single prompt-response). REQ-N002

requirement.title: Workflow A/B With Plugin Dir
requirement.description: In workflow A/B mode, treatment uses semi-isolated + plugin-dir when scenario specifies Plugin Dir. Baseline remains fully isolated.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Workflow A/B baseline trials always run with isolated=true. REQ-F009
Workflow A/B treatment trials use semi-isolated + plugin-dir when scenario has pluginDir defined. REQ-F009
A/B treatment without scenario pluginDir uses existing non-isolated behavior. REQ-N002
